channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Meets with Hamas and Hezbollah During Ali Khamenei's Funeral
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi met with representatives of Hamas, Hezbollah, and other regional allies during the funeral of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei, according to state media. The multi-d...

item.title: Trump's Alleged Influence on FIFA World Cup Decision Sparks Controversy
item.description: President Donald Trump reportedly intervened in the FIFA World Cup to reinstate U.S. soccer player Folarin Balogun, who had been suspended after receiving a red card. The decision by FIFA to overturn ...

item.title: Brazil coach Ancelotti rejects 'anti-Haaland' strategy ahead of World Cup clash with Norway
item.description: Brazil's coach Carlo Ancelotti has dismissed suggestions of a specific 'anti-Haaland plan' for their World Cup Round of 16 match against Norway, emphasizing trust in the team's collective defensive st...

item.title: Farage and Cottrell: Controversy Over Unreported Benefits and Legal Past
item.description: The article details the controversy surrounding Nigel Farage, leader of Reform UK, and his alleged failure to declare benefits received from George Cottrell, a convicted criminal and aristocrat. Cottr...

item.title: Protests and Clashes in AJK Amid JAAC Demands
item.description: Clashes erupted in Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK) as the proscribed Joint Awami Action Committee (JAAC) organized demonstrations across the region. In Mirpur district, protests led to injuries among pro...

item.title: Shakira and FIFA commit $500,000 to Venezuela earthquake relief and education support
item.description: Shakira has pledged $500,000 from the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund to support education intervention for children affected by the devastating earthquakes in northern Venezuela on June 24, 2026. ...

item.title: Tanzania and China Strengthen Business Collaboration
item.description: The Tanzanian government has introduced guidelines to ensure safer business practices with China, emphasizing regulatory compliance and due diligence as trade between the two nations grows. With Chine...

item.title: Journalist Accuses Bank MD of Romantic Affair, Faces Arrest and Detention
item.description: Nura Distin, a journalist, accused Sheriff Almuhajir, the Managing Director of Yobe Microfinance Bank, of having a romantic affair with his wife, leading to his arrest and detention. Distin claimed Al...

item.title: French President Macron to Visit Syria Following Assad's Ouster
item.description: French President Emmanuel Macron is set to become the first Western leader to visit Syria since the ousting of President Bashar al-Assad in 2025, according to Damascus. The announcement highlights the...

item.title: Victor Asiwe's Academic Achievements and Journey to Stanford University
item.description: Victor Asiwe, a 27-year-old actuary, has achieved remarkable success by graduating in the top 1% of his MBA class at Stanford University's Graduate School of Business. Born in Nigeria and raised in Po...

item.title: DOJ Says Windows Device Identifier and Digital Evidence Helped Link Suspect to Alleged Scattered Spider Ransomware Attacks
item.description: U.S. authorities have charged 19-year-old dual U.S.-Estonian citizen Peter Stokes in connection with alleged ransomware and cyber intrusion activities attributed to the Scattered Spider cybercrime gro...

item.title: BJP criticizes Mamata Banerjee over TMC internal conflicts and MLA treatment
item.description: The BJP has accused former West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee of treating her Trinamool Congress (TMC) party members as mere servants, following internal factional clashes. West Bengal BJP lea...

item.title: FIFA President's Private Jet Sparks Controversy Amid Norway's World Cup 2026 Match
item.description: The article details a controversy surrounding FIFA President Gianni Infantino's private jet during Norway's World Cup 2026 qualifier against Gianni Lise Klaveness. The incident has raised questions ab...

item.title: Rare Rolex Rainbow Daytona leads multimillion-dollar Swiss watch auction in Sydney
item.description: A rare Rolex ‘Rainbow’ Daytona is expected to be the highlight of an upcoming watch auction in Sydney, where a collection of 28 luxury Swiss timepieces is forecast to achieve more than $2 million in t...

item.title: Junior Springboks Make Six Changes for Decisive Wales Clash in Pool A
item.description: The Junior Springboks, currently leading Pool A, will face Wales in a crucial match to secure top spot. Coach Kevin Foote has made six changes to the starting lineup, including debutant flyhalf Yaqeen...

item.title: PAF Officer Killed in Islamabad, Suspect Arrested Within 9 Hours
item.description: The Islamabad Inspector General of Police (IGP) Ali Nasir Rizvi confirmed that the suspect who allegedly shot dead a Pakistan Air Force (PAF) officer was arrested within nine hours of the incident. Th...

item.title: NYPD detective protected by ballistic vest as separate Brooklyn shootings leave multiple adults and children injured
item.description: A violent Fourth of July holiday weekend in Brooklyn left an NYPD detective and several civilians, including four children, injured in separate shooting incidents. Early Sunday morning in Crown Height...

item.title: Nigeria Customs and Afreximbank deepen partnership to strengthen AfCFTA trade facilitation and customs modernisation
item.description: The Nigeria Customs Service (NCS) has strengthened its partnership with the African Export-Import Bank (Afreximbank) to support the implementation of the African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA) a...

item.title: Larry David's new show honors Rob Reiner with posthumous role
item.description: The article discusses how Larry David's upcoming television show includes a posthumous role for actor Rob Reiner, who passed away in 2022. Reiner, known for his work in 'The Larry Sanders Show' and ot...

item.title: Canadian PM Mark Carney's NATO Summit Visit and Middle East Diplomacy
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney is set to attend the NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey, marking the first Canadian prime ministerial visit to the country since 2015. The summit, held on July 7 and 8, has been ...
